detail.error: VALIDATION_PREVIEW rejected PR-AS79-8SDF:text_count: {"status":"INVALID","submission_id":"b6cbd18f5f564df9bb5b4f4718f28752","issues":[{"code":"8541","message":"The Listing data provided is different from what's already in the Amazon catalog. The following listing attribute value(s) conflict with Amazon catalog value(s): 'item_name' (Merchant [en_US: \"Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam – 12g Protein Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 30 Count\"] / Amazon [en_US: \"Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich, 12g Protein, 2.8 oz, 30 Count\"]).
